title: Ametek (AME) Reports Q4 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: The headline numbers for Ametek (AME) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended December 2022, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: AMETEK, Inc. (AME) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE:AME ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 2, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Kevin Coleman - Vice President of Investor Relations, and Treasurer Dave Zapico - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bill Burke - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Allison Poliniak - Wells Fargo Deane Dray - RBC Capital Markets Brett Linzey - Mizuho Scott Graham - Loop Capital Markets Will Jellison - D.A. Davidson David Ridley-Lane - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Joe Giordano - Cowen Rob Mason - Robert W.

title: Ametek (AME) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Ametek (AME) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.40% and 2.63%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
